title: Platylepis glandulosa

Within the Orchidaceae family, Platylepis glandulosa is classified as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further classification places it in the tribe Cranichideae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support respiratory and digestive health.
